title: Figure 7 in Usefulness of DEET (N,n-diethyl-meta-toluamide) in the directed expulsion of different groups of mites and invertebrates in Berlese-Tullgren funnels
author: RzepeckiK, Aleksander
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 7 Monthly extraction yields of Mesostigmata, Oribatida, Astigmatina, and Other Invertebrates using varying DEET dosages (M: 2.5 ml, E: 3.5 ml, L: 5 ml) from June to November 2023. Bars represent the number of extracted individuals, with trend lines indicating dosage response across taxa. Data highlights dosage-dependent variations in extraction efficiency.
steps_raw: Figure 7 Monthly extraction yields of Mesostigmata, Oribatida, Astigmatina, and Other Invertebrates using varying DEET dosages (M: 2.5 ml, E: 3.5 ml, L: 5 ml) from June to November 2023.
